summary: Tested Multi-Step Onboarding Flow for CRM/RMS app. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 4 steps verified with correct UI elements. AI bio generation works via API. Note: Frontend page requires authentication - when accessed without login, userId is empty and API calls fail (expected behavior).
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/profile/{user_id} correctly returns all pre-filled fields: title, company, website, social_links, needs_password_change, tone_preference, review_url (lines 22-107 in profile.py)
PUT /api/profile/{user_id} correctly saves all fields including company, website, review_url, social_twitter, social_tiktok, tone_preference (lines 110-167 in profile.py)
PUT /api/profile/{user_id} correctly maps social_instagram/social_facebook etc to social_links.instagram/social_links.facebook in DB via social_map (lines 131-144 in profile.py)
POST /api/auth/change-password works and clears needs_password_change flag (lines 691-736 in auth.py)
POST /api/profile/{user_id}/generate-bio generates AI bio using Emergent LLM Key GPT-5.2 (lines 215-297 in profile.py)
PUT /api/profile/{user_id} with onboarding_complete=true marks onboarding done (line 117 in profile.py)
Frontend complete-profile.tsx renders 4-step wizard with progress bar (line 240), step indicators (line 233), skip button (line 235), back button (line 428), continue button (line 432)
Frontend Step 0 (Password) shows temp password, new password, confirm password fields with validation (lines 252-278)
Frontend Step 1 (About You) shows photo upload area, title, company, hometown, years of experience, hobbies, family, fun facts, and AI tone picker (lines 281-328)
Frontend Step 2 (Links) shows website, instagram, facebook, linkedin, twitter, tiktok, review URL inputs with icons (lines 332-363)
Frontend Step 3 (Bio + Preview) shows Generate Bio button, bio text area, mini digital card preview with photo, name, title, bio, social icons (lines 367-423)
Frontend pre-fill works - data from profile API populates the form fields on load (lines 67-90)
Frontend Skip button advances to next step or finishes onboarding on last step (lines 213-216)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 4 steps verified with correct UI elements)

seed_data_creation: Test user 'onboard_flow_test@test.com' was pre-created by main agent with pre-filled data (title: Senior Sales Rep, company: FlowTest Motors, website: https://flowtest.com, socials: instagram/facebook/linkedin)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-step onboarding flow fully tested. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_onboarding_flow.py cover: GET /api/profile/{user_id} returns pre-filled fields, PUT /api/profile/{user_id} saves all fields including social mapping, POST /api/auth/change-password clears needs_password_change, POST /api/profile/{user_id}/generate-bio generates AI bio. Frontend verified: 4-step wizard with progress bar, all form fields present, skip/back/continue buttons work, card preview shows.

mocked_apis.note: Twilio SMS is in MOCK mode. AI bio generation uses real Emergent LLM Key (GPT-5.2).
